project: Western US Overland & RV Navigational Database

resources.name: RV LIFE Trip Wizard
resources.description: Visual RV trip planner that customizes routes based on the 12ft height and weight of the motorhome. Avoids low clearances, steep grades, and propane restrictions.

resources.name: HeadRoom by Low Clearance Map
resources.description: Mobile app featuring 24,000+ verified low-clearance bridges. Features Hazard Headings (directional warnings) and Sentry Mode for background hazard monitoring.

resources.name: Trucker Path
resources.description: Commercial trucking app adapted for RV use. Provides truck-safe navigation, clearance heights, and statuses on large truck stops and weigh stations.

resources.name: Backcountry Discovery Routes (BDR)
resources.description: Non-profit organization providing free GPX tracks and maps for multi-day, off-pavement adventure motorcycle routes across Western states.

resources.name: onX Offroad
resources.description: Official navigation app of the BDR. Provides seamless GPX imports, offline maps, and clearly defined public land boundaries.

resources.name: Gaia GPS
resources.description: Highly detailed topographic mapping application. Features one-click BDR route imports, MVUM layers, and custom off-grid map caching.

resources.name: ADV Rider
resources.description: iOS app built for enduro/adventure riders featuring rally-style navigation, GPX tracking, and fuel-range gauges.

resources.name: Avenza Maps
resources.description: Offline map viewer that interacts with device GPS. The primary tool for downloading and viewing USFS MVUMs (Motor Vehicle Use Maps) and GeoPDFs.

resources.name: USFS Interactive MVUM Finder
resources.description: Federal portal to locate and download official legal Motor Vehicle Use Maps for National Forests.

resources.name: BLM National Data Viewer
resources.description: Official ArcGIS interactive map showing Surface Management Agency (SMA) boundaries, ensuring legal camping on BLM land.

resources.name: iOverlander
resources.description: Crowdsourced database of wild campsites, water points, and stealth parking. Operates primarily offline.

resources.name: Campendium
resources.description: Database for finding free dispersed campsites, state parks, and RV parks, featuring user reviews and cellular coverage reports.

resources.name: Washington DNR Recreation Map
resources.description: Interactive map for state forests in Washington. Indicates open campsites and Discover Pass requirements.
